properties.name: app.api.version
properties.description: API version prefix for all endpoints.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed origins for CORS.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-methods
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed HTTP methods for CORS.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-headers
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed HTTP headers for CORS.

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT secret key used for signing tokens.

properties.name: jwt.access-token.expiration
properties.description: Expiration time for access tokens in milliseconds.

properties.name: jwt.refresh-token.expiration
properties.description: Expiration time for refresh tokens in milliseconds.
